args.content:
Activity 5: Virtual Escape Room
  - Description: Teams participate in an online escape room challenge where they must solve puzzles and find clues to 'escape' within a set time limit.
  - Objective: To enhance problem-solving skills and teamwork in a fun, virtual environment.
  - Location: Online
  - Date: 2024-01-10
  - Time: 16:00 - 17:30

Activity 6: Charity Volunteering Day
  - Description: Team members volunteer together at a local charity or community organization.
  - Objective: To foster a sense of community and teamwork while giving back to society.
  - Location: Local Charity
  - Date: 2024-02-14
  - Time: 09:00 - 13:00

args.subject: Feedback scores
args.body:
Hi David,

Here are the feedback scores as requested:

- Olivia Smith: 4
- Mia Anderson: 2
- Mason Thompson: 3

Best,
Emma
